_schema.id: two-digit project number, ordered by maturity (most finished first)
_schema.name: short project title
_schema.adopt_type: EXTEND (live, build on it) | FORK (starter you own) | BUILD (concept on a rail)
_schema.description: 1-2 sentence what + why (grounded in the repo, no guessing)
_schema.spec_url: deep link to repo or spec doc
_schema.color: ZAO palette key: orange | cyan | gold | pink | zabal
_schema.claimed_by: Farcaster handle of the builder (if claimed)

projects.name: ZAOOS
projects.description: The ZAO's monorepo lab and gated Farcaster client - social feed, audio/video spaces, governance, and a large research library. New features prototype here before graduating to their own repos.
projects.ship_next: Fork the community config to stand up your own gated Farcaster community.

projects.name: ZAONEXUS
projects.description: A searchable directory of 200+ links across The ZAO community and ecosystem, with dark/light mode and live partnership data.
projects.ship_next: Add a 'what's new' badge that spotlights links added in the last 7-30 days.

projects.name: ZAO-Leaderboard
projects.description: Onchain leaderboard ranking ZAO members by Respect holdings (OG Respect + ZOR) on Optimism, with identity from Airtable and join dates via Alchemy.
projects.ship_next: Add a Respect-per-month velocity metric to surface rising contributors.

projects.name: zao-claude-skills
projects.description: A library of hand-written Claude Code skills for the ZAO ecosystem - meeting capture, research, distribution, and bot ops - with an auto-sync wrapper.
projects.ship_next: Write a new skill for your own build workflow and add it to the pack.

projects.name: ZAOscribe (Discord audio capture)
projects.description: A Discord bot that joins a voice channel, records per-speaker audio, transcribes it, and extracts action items to a tracked file - then posts a recap.
projects.ship_next: Fork it for your own Discord server's meeting capture and action tracking.

projects.name: wavewarzapp
projects.description: A fan spectator and alert app for WaveWarZ Solana music battles - real-time battle view, artist stats, follows, and one-tap trade deep links.
projects.ship_next: Add native push notifications when a followed artist's battle goes live.

projects.name: songjam-site
projects.description: The Songjam leaderboard and music-drops frontend - aggregates Farcaster, Space, and timeline contribution points into a live leaderboard.
projects.ship_next: Fork the points-aggregation pattern to build a contribution leaderboard for your own track.

projects.name: zpoidh
projects.description: The BetterCallZaal POIDH bounty ops home - rounds, judging pages, brand kits, and the leaderboard. Round 3 (the ZABAL Gamez best-ad bounty) runs here.
projects.ship_next: Add a public bounty leaderboard page that reads submissions from the POIDH Base contract.

projects.name: CoCConcertZ
projects.description: A live virtual-concert platform and Farcaster Mini App for COC Concertz - artist portals, admin show controls, live chat, recaps, and fan galleries.
projects.ship_next: Add dynamic, branded OG cards per artist to replace the placeholder social images.

projects.name: zlank
projects.description: A no-code Farcaster Snap builder - stack blocks, hit Deploy, share a feed-native interactive Snap. Eleven block types, live preview, partner templates.
projects.ship_next: Build a Snap discovery/gallery page that ranks user-created Snaps by views.

projects.name: fishbowlz
projects.description: Persistent audio rooms with hot-seat rotation, live transcripts, speaker roles, token gating, and tipping - Farcaster-native conversations across multiple topics.
projects.ship_next: Wire speaker tipping (ETH/USDC on Base) to the existing tip UI via a 0xSplits revenue split.

projects.name: nouns-snap (example Snap)
projects.description: A finished example Snap that browses Nouns DAO NFTs - shows a Noun by id with image, owner, and the live auction.
projects.ship_next: Fork it as the template for your own NFT-collection Snap.

projects.name: duodo-snap (example Snap)
projects.description: A finished example Snap built for the Duo Do music fundraiser - goal tracker, music nav, event info, mobile-polished.
projects.ship_next: Fork it as the template for your own event or fundraiser Snap.

projects.name: zabalsnap1 (example Snap)
projects.description: A finished example Snap - a ZABAL token tracker with burn tracker, live price, balance checker, leaderboard, and share.
projects.ship_next: Fork it as the template for your own token-dashboard Snap.

projects.name: ltaesnap (example Snap)
projects.description: A finished example Snap for the Let The Artist Eat podcast - episode cards, host profiles, and an origin-story page.
projects.ship_next: Fork it as the template for your own podcast or media Snap.

projects.name: ZAOVideoEditor
projects.description: A local-first video editor for conversation content (podcasts, livestreams, calls) - AI transcription, burned captions, and YouTube metadata generation.
projects.ship_next: Add one-tap upload to YouTube using the exported description, chapters, tags, and captions.

projects.name: zaomusicbot
projects.description: A Discord music bot (Lavalink + discord.js) with lofi and radio commands and a web UI.
projects.ship_next: Add a ZAO radio station preset and a now-playing card that posts to a channel.

projects.name: zaostock
projects.description: The dashboard and public site for ZAOstock 2026, an artist-built festival in Ellsworth, Maine - team login, volunteer signup, working circles, and the day-of schedule.
projects.ship_next: Add real-time team score calculation from the working-circle progress metrics in Supabase.

projects.name: ZAOfractal
projects.description: The governance documentation and research hub for ZAO Fractal - the weekly Respect Game on Optimism running since August 2024. Astro site with whitepaper chapters and a week counter.
projects.ship_next: Draft whitepaper chapters 4-11 to formalize the governance model for new fractals.

projects.name: fractalbot (April 2026)
projects.description: The Fractal Respect Game bot - voting flows, onchain Respect token submission to Optimism, and Snapshot integration.
projects.ship_next: Document the webhook integrations (wallet registration, poll flows) so others can run a fractal.

projects.name: This /zabal mini app
projects.description: The Farcaster Mini App you are on - the ZABAL Gamez season hub: workshop schedule, join counter, activity backend, and submission board. The highest-leverage build to extend.
projects.ship_next: Extend the submissions board, the workshop calendar, or the activity leaderboard.

projects.name: zabalartsubmission
projects.description: ZABAL Live Hub - a Farcaster mini app for community voting on live-stream direction (Studio / Market / Social / Battle), with a leaderboard.
projects.ship_next: Add a daily leaderboard card showing top contributors to drive engagement streaks.

projects.name: bcz-yapz
projects.description: The BCZ YapZ long-form interview show site - searchable episode archive with transcripts, YouTube chapters, and topic tags.
projects.ship_next: Add full-text search across transcripts plus a Bonfire ingest for topic discovery.

projects.name: farscout
projects.description: An autonomous Farcaster research scout - reads casts and channels, triages for novelty, grounds findings in multiple sources, and delivers via Discord slash commands.
projects.ship_next: Ship a /watch command that pings only when a token, person, or topic does something notable.

projects.name: ZAOcowork
projects.description: A task tracker (Supabase) with a Telegram bot and a Next.js Kanban web UI, plus an autonomous research-dispatch pipeline. Cross-source writes by UUID.
projects.ship_next: Fork the auth and extend it from single-user to a multiplayer team board.

projects.name: hermes-orchestrator
projects.description: A supervisor framework for agentic systems - classify a task, spawn an agent, watch its streaming output, intervene, and learn. Pluggable runner/memory/pattern adapters.
projects.ship_next: Implement an adapter for your own task type and ship it as a new pattern.

projects.name: WARZAI
projects.description: A WaveWarZ AI agent (ElizaOS) with Solana onchain integration.
projects.ship_next: Deploy it to the WaveWarZ Discord and wire Helius for live trade and battle data.

projects.name: Aurdour
projects.description: A browser-based two-deck DJ platform with real-time mixing, effects, and a Flow Mode auto-DJ for non-DJs.
projects.ship_next: Add one-tap publishing of a recorded set to Audius.

projects.name: Zuke
projects.description: A white-label live audio-rooms surface for Farcaster communities - create and join spaces, listener badges, webhook sync, and admin auth. Built for the idea of running several topic rooms at once to bring people together.
projects.ship_next: Add Sign-In-With-Neynar so any host can run their own room, not just admins.

projects.name: zaoprojects
projects.description: A ZAO ecosystem progress-timeline dashboard (early v0.1) wired to a data source.
projects.ship_next: Wire it to live project data from ZAO OS and publish it as the public ecosystem dashboard.

projects.name: ZAO 101
projects.description: A static onboarding guide to The ZAO (home, pillars, join, FAQ) - scaffolded with placeholder copy, the smallest scope on this list.
projects.ship_next: Write the onboarding copy and pillar pages - content is mostly derivable from the ZAO research.

projects.name: ZOUNZ
projects.description: A Farcaster music NFT mini app (MVP) - browse and create collections, mint on Base, share to feed. Stubs in place for mint.club, not yet deployed.
projects.ship_next: Wire the mint.club API to the mint button, test the mint-to-Base flow, and deploy.

projects.name: ZAOFlights
projects.description: A conversational flight-search scaffold (Next.js, chat + results split) - a single initial commit, wide open for a builder to own.
projects.ship_next: Build the flight-search flow on the scaffold (integrate a flight API) and tie trips to Cal.com/Lu.ma.

projects.name: zlank-snap-template
projects.description: A starter template for building Farcaster Snaps by hand - Hono + Vercel + the Farcaster Snap SDK, multi-page with form, state, and share patterns.
projects.ship_next: Add a share-cast button generator and publish a 5-minute Snap quickstart.

projects.name: A new ZOE skill
projects.description: Extend the ZOE concierge bot (Telegram). The backend mirrors the Hermes runtime - a Claude Code CLI subprocess with a swapped system prompt.
projects.ship_next: Pick one skill (e.g. query the ZABAL leaderboard), write the system prompt, wire it to the runner, test in DMs.

projects.name: WaveWarZ-Base Finals settlement surface
projects.description: Wire the WaveWarZ-Base contracts into the Finals page - read live battle state, render a trade view per finalist, show the settlement readout at T+72h. Pairs with Sam's contract work.
projects.ship_next: Build the /finals contract reader and a per-finalist card with live price and volume (testnet in July).

projects.name: Songjam leaderboard migration
projects.description: Move the Songjam leaderboard off the deprecated X scraper onto an Empire Builder leaderboard, so it runs on Farcaster-native data and frees the maintainer.
projects.ship_next: Confirm the Empire Builder leaderboard API first, then emit Songjam engagement as address+score and register it.

projects.name: POIDH bounty leaderboard
projects.description: An Empire Builder leaderboard that counts unique POIDH bounty submitters across all ZABAL bounties, replacing manual per-submitter outreach.
projects.ship_next: Read the POIDH Base contract submissions, aggregate by wallet, and (after confirming the Empire Builder API) push the leaderboard.

projects.name: COC Concertz content pipeline
projects.description: Automate the COC Concertz cross-post end: take the Descript export and YouTube description and fan it out to the social platforms via the ZAO publishing module.
projects.ship_next: Build a Descript export webhook that parses segments and cross-posts to X, Bluesky, Discord, and Farcaster.

projects.name: Concert discovery + calendar
projects.description: A lighter, separate build idea: surface concert events for the ZAO music community - filter by date/genre/venue, export to calendar, cast to Farcaster.
projects.ship_next: Pick a concerts API (e.g. Bandsintown), filter and render events, and add an ICS export.

projects.name: zlank Empire daily-stats Snap template
projects.description: A one-click 'Today's Empire Builder stats' Snap template on zlank. A kmac.eth + Zaal collab; the Footy app is the reference.
projects.ship_next: Build the daily-stats block on zlank that reads an Empire's leaderboard and renders a shareable Snap.

projects.name: ZAO Snaps tab on zlank - 8 templates
projects.description: A curated tab of pre-built Snap templates for ZAO use cases, tracked in zlank Issue 64.
projects.ship_next: Create the first three templates (leaderboard query, ZOE claim form, event RSVP) and ship them in the zlank library.

projects.name: Twitch to Empire Builder feed
projects.description: Feed StreamElements WebSocket events from a live Twitch stream into an Empire Builder leaderboard, so stream activity becomes a real-time leaderboard for any creator.
projects.ship_next: Subscribe to StreamElements events, aggregate per wallet, and (after confirming the Empire Builder API) push the feed.

projects.name: Streaming auto-clip flywheel
projects.description: Turn hours of stream into short clips for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and Farcaster - the content engine for ZABAL Gamez and every future ZAO event. Builds on ZAOVideoEditor.
projects.ship_next: Add clip-detection over a VOD and a batch generator that outputs captioned clips (test on a 30-minute workshop).

projects.name: ZABAL Gamez GitHub-auth judging system
projects.description: The July judging rail. Signup links a wallet or Farcaster identity to a GitHub account (multiple accounts OK). A skill file pushes a builder's work to GitHub with their wallet in an MD file and makes one call to a register server that keeps a wallet-to-repo map; a cron turns new commits into Bonfire episodes scored by value to the ZAO ecosystem. Rolling admission, built in public.
projects.ship_next: Build the register server - a wallet-to-repo map plus one endpoint the skill file calls - and the cron that turns new commits into scored Bonfire episodes.
